title: Naming Files Well
drDigitalIntro:
A good file name tells you what's inside without opening it.
• "Beach-Vacation-2025.jpg" is clear.
• "img_20250104_FINAL(2).jpg" is confusing.
• Let's rename a messy file to something useful.

playgroundTask.goal: Rename a messy file to something clear

steps.say: A badly-named file is hiding in Downloads. Click Downloads to find it.
See 'img_20250104_FINAL(2).jpg'? Nobody can tell what that is. Click it, click Rename, then type Beach-Vacation-2025.jpg and press Enter.

drDigitalSuccess: Much better! 'Beach-Vacation-2025.jpg' tells you exactly what the file is. Good names save you time.
drDigitalHint: First click the file once to select it, then click the glowing Rename button, then type the new name and press Enter.
